sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 4분기 매출은 197억 달러로 전년 대비 12% 성장했으며, 소프트웨어와 인프라 모두 두 자릿수 성장이 전체를 이끌었다.

keyPoints.text: 4분기 매출은 197억 달러로 전년 대비 12% 성장했으며, 소프트웨어와 인프라 모두 두 자릿수 성장이 전체를 이끌었다.
2025년 연간 생성형 AI 수주잔고가 125억 달러를 넘어섰으며, CEO Krishna는 2025년이 매출·이익·잉여현금흐름 모두에서 기대를 초과한 강한 한 해였다고 평가했다.
2025년 연간 영업활동 현금흐름 132억 달러, 잉여현금흐름 147억 달러를 기록했으며, 2026년 연간 잉여현금흐름은 전년 대비 약 10억 달러 증가할 것으로 전망했다.

businessChanges.text: 2025년 연간 매출은 675억 달러로, 소프트웨어 12% 성장과 인프라 강세가 전체 성장을 견인했다.
차세대 메인프레임 플랫폼 채택 확대로 인프라 세그먼트가 17% 성장했으며, 이는 제품 주기 확대 효과를 반영한다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 비GAAP 매출총이익률 61.8%(120포인트 개선), 연간 비GAAP 총이익률 59.5%(170포인트 개선)로 마진이 큰 폭으로 확대됐다.
2026년 연간 가이던스: 불변환율 기준 매출 성장 5% 이상, 잉여현금흐름 전년 대비 약 10억 달러 증가 전망을 제시했다.

watchItems.text: AI 수주잔고 125억 달러 이후의 전환율(수익화 시점)과 컨설팅 세그먼트의 성장 재가속 여부가 핵심 모니터링 포인트다.
2026년 환율이 약 반 포인트 성장 순풍으로 작용할 것으로 보이나, 달러 방향성 변화 시 영향 재평가가 필요하다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 ibm-20260128xex991.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 IBM RELEASES FOURTH-QUARTER RESULTS Strong, broad-based performance, led by double-digit Software and Infrastructure growth; Double-digit growth in full-year profit and free cash flow ARMONK, N.Y., January 28, 2026 . . . IBM (NYSE: IBM) today announced fourth-quarter 2025 earnings results. “In the fourth quarter, we delivered strong revenue growth, with double-digit Software performance. Additionally, Infrastructure continued its double-digit revenue growth with the robust adoption of the next generation of our mainframe platform. Our generative AI book of business now stands at more than $12.5 billion. This capped a strong 2025 for IBM where we exceeded expectations for revenue, profit and free cash flow," said Arvind Krishna, IBM chairman, president and chief executive officer. "We enter 2026 with momentum and in a position  Normalized numeric aliases: $12.5 billion = 125억 달러; $12.5 = 12.5달러.

of strength, giving us confidence in our full-year expectations of more than 5 percent constant currency revenue growth and an increase of about $1 billion in year-over-year free cash flow.” Fourth-Quarter Highlights • Revenue – Revenue of $19.7 billion, up 12 percent, up 9 percent at constant currency – Software revenue up 14 percent, up 11 percent at constant currency – Consulting revenue up 3 percent, up 1 percent at constant currency – Infrastructure revenue up 21 percent, up 17 percent at constant currency • Profit – Gross Profit Margin: GAAP: 60.6 percent, up 110 basis points; Operating (Non-GAAP): 61.8 percent, up 120 basis points Full-Year  Normalized numeric aliases: $1 billion = 10억 달러; $19.7 billion = 197억 달러; $67.5 billion = 675억 달러; $1 = 1달러; $19.7 = 19.7달러; $67.5 = 67.5달러; 5 percent = 5%; 12 percent = 12%; 14 percent = 14%; 17 percent = 17%; 2 percent = 2%; 61.8 percent = 61.8%; 8 percent = 8%; 6 percent = 6%; 110 basis points = 110포인트; 120 basis points = 120포인트.

revenue up 12 percent, up 10 percent at constant currency • Profit – Gross Profit Margin: GAAP: 58.2 percent, up 150 basis points; Operating (Non-GAAP): 59.5 percent, up 170 basis points • Cash Flow – Net cash from operating activities of $13.2 billion; free cash flow of $14.7 billion Full-Year 2026 Expectations • Revenue: The company expects full-year constant currency revenue growth of more than 5 percent. At current foreign exchange rates, currency is expected to be about a half-point tailwind to growth for the year • Free cash flow: The company expects full-year free cash flow to increase by about $1 billion year-over-year FOURTH - QUARTER 2025 INCOME STATEMENT  Normalized numeric aliases: $13.2 billion = 132억 달러; $14.7 billion = 147억 달러; $1 billion = 10억 달러; $13.2 = 13.2달러; $14.7 = 14.7달러; $1 = 1달러; $19.7 = 19.7달러; $11.9 = 11.9달러; $5.6 = 5.6달러; 59.5 percent = 59.5%; 10 percent = 10%; 58.2 percent = 58.2%; 5 percent = 5%; 150 basis points = 150포인트; 170 basis points = 170포인트.

% (1) 14 % 1.1 Pts 25 % (3) 2.2 Pts (3) 91 % (notes 2 and 3) 88 % (notes 2 and 3) Operating (Non-GAAP) $ 12.2B 61.8 % $ 4.7B 24.1 % $ 4.3B $ 4.52 Year/Year 14 % 1.2 Pts 11 % (0.2) Pts 17 % 15 % (1) 9% at constant currency. (2) 2025 GAAP results include a benefit from income taxes primarily driven by the resolution of certain tax audit matters. (3) GAAP YTY results include the impact of a pension settlement charge in fourth-quarter 2024. “2025 put IBM's durability, resilience and differentiation on display. Our portfolio mix, integrated value and rapid innovation drove higher revenue growth and double-digit profit and free cash flow growth," said James Kavanaugh, IBM senior vice president and chief financial officer. "We are excited about our prospects for 2026 as our disciplined execution and unwavering focus on productivity will continue to enable us to invest in the future while  Normalized numeric aliases: $12.2 = 12.2달러; $4.7 = 4.7달러; $4.3 = 4.3달러; $4.52 = 4.52달러.
